title: Types of Mergers: Which of the following best...
summary: Define a horizontal merger as the combination of two competitors operating in the same industry.
prompt: Which of the following best defines a horizontal merger?

options.text: A horizontal merger occurs when two competitors combine
A proxy contest for board control

solution: A horizontal merger occurs when two competitors combine, which can potentially lead to increased market power. Such mergers may be scrutinized for antitrust issues.
